news.headline: TENX Initiates Coverage On Evercore ISI Group -- Rating Set to Outperform
news.summary: Evercore ISI initiated coverage of Tenax Therapeutics with an "Outperform" rating and a $39 price target, calling the upcoming Phase 3 LEVEL readout a "critical binary event" that could reshape market expectations given the large unmet need in PH-HFpEF. The new target implies roughly 148% upside from the stock's prior close.

news.headline: Tenax Therapeutics (TENX) Gets Updated 3.3% Ownership Filing From Millennium Group
news.summary: Millennium Management and affiliated funds (including Israel A. Englander) filed an amended Schedule 13G/A disclosing a reduced 3.3% passive stake in Tenax Therapeutics, down from the 5.1% stake reported in May 2026. The trim came in the run-up to the Phase 3 LEVEL data readout expected in August 2026.

news.headline: Tenax Therapeutics, Inc. Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
news.summary: The seven analysts currently covering TENX give it a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average 12-month price target around $38, following recent target hikes from Piper Sandler (to $50) and Guggenheim (to $40), underscoring bullish sell-side positioning heading into the Phase 3 LEVEL data readout.

news.headline: Short Interest in Tenax Therapeutics (TENX) Increases by 132.9%
news.summary: Short interest in TENX jumped 132.9% to 1.79 million shares (about 7.0% of float) as of June 30, 2026, up from 767,532 shares two weeks earlier, signaling a sharp rise in bearish or hedging positioning ahead of the binary Phase 3 LEVEL data readout.

news.headline: FMR LLC (Fidelity) Discloses New 14.9% Stake in Tenax Therapeutics
news.summary: FMR LLC, the parent of Fidelity Management & Research, disclosed a new passive stake of 3,942,373 shares (14.9%) in Tenax Therapeutics as of June 30, 2026, after acquiring roughly 3.6 million shares in that period, one of the largest institutional accumulations disclosed ahead of the LEVEL trial readout.

news.headline: Tenax Therapeutics Announces Late-Breaking Presentation of LEVEL Clinical Trial Data at ESC Congress 2026
news.summary: Tenax will present Phase 3 LEVEL trial results for oral levosimendan (TNX-103) in a Late-Breaking Clinical Science session at ESC Congress 2026 in Munich on August 29, with topline data now expected in August 2026 ahead of database lock and statistical analysis.

catalysts.label: Phase 3 LEVEL topline data readout
catalysts.detail: Tenax expects to report topline data from the registrational Phase 3 LEVEL trial of oral levosimendan (TNX-103) in PH-HFpEF in August 2026; enrollment (230+ patients) completed in March 2026 and the trial has since moved through database lock and statistical analysis.

catalysts.label: Late-breaking LEVEL data presentation at ESC Congress 2026
catalysts.detail: Full LEVEL trial results will be presented in a Late-Breaking Clinical Science session at the European Society of Cardiology Congress in Munich (Aug 28-31), presented by Prof. Sanjiv Shah, MD, Northwestern University, on Saturday Aug 29 at 11:15-11:30 CEST.

catalysts.label: LEVEL-2 global Phase 3 enrollment completion
catalysts.detail: The second registrational Phase 3 study (LEVEL-2, ~540 patients across 100+ sites in 15 countries) is expected to complete enrollment by the end of 2027.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 financial results
catalysts.detail: Tenax's next quarterly earnings report and corporate update is estimated for mid-August 2026 by third-party earnings trackers (Q1 2026 results were released May 12), likely alongside or shortly after the LEVEL topline data disclosure; the company has not yet issued an official press release confirming the exact date.

pulse: As of July 23, 2026, Tenax Therapeutics remains in a quiet holding pattern ahead of the pivotal readout for oral levosimendan (TNX-103) in pulmonary hypertension due to HFpEF, with topline Phase 3 LEVEL data expected in August 2026 and a late-breaking full data presentation confirmed for ESC Congress in Munich on August 29. Sell-side conviction has kept building into the catalyst: Evercore ISI became the latest analyst to initiate coverage (Outperform, $39 target) on July 22, joining a consensus "Moderate Buy" with an average target near $38 (Piper Sandler as high as $50, Guggenheim at $40), even as institutional positioning has grown more crowded and two-sided, with Fidelity's FMR LLC disclosing a fresh 14.9% stake as of June 30 while Millennium Management trimmed its stake to 3.3% from 5.1% and short interest surged 132.9% to about 7% of float. The stock's near-term trajectory hinges almost entirely on whether LEVEL hits its 6-minute-walk-distance primary endpoint, a binary catalyst that would position TNX-103 as a potential first-in-class approved PH-HFpEF therapy, with Q2 2026 earnings unofficially estimated around mid-August but not yet formally scheduled by the company.
